reply:
[[BLOCK:slide22_shape1]]
Regression coefficients will be reduced to zero → Variable selection is performed by eliminating certain variables.  
Not suitable for wide data structures: If there are too many predictor variables and too few observations (high p, low n), LASSO quickly saturates (stops further variable selection).  
When there are too many collinear predictor variables, LASSO will select only one and ignore the others.
